nodes.label: Common Indian Spices
nodes.description: Spices used every day in Indian kitchens

nodes.label: Turmeric (Haldi)
nodes.description: Yellow spice from a root, used in cooking and medicine

nodes.label: Red Chilli (Mirch)
nodes.description: Makes food spicy and red, used across India

nodes.label: Cumin (Jeera)
nodes.description: Small brown seeds used for tempering and flavour

nodes.label: Black Pepper (King)
nodes.description: King of Spices, grown in Kerala

nodes.label: Cardamom (Queen)
nodes.description: Queen of Spices, used in sweets and chai

nodes.label: Saffron (Kesar)
nodes.description: Most expensive spice, grown in Kashmir

nodes.label: Regional Cuisines

nodes.label: South India
nodes.description: Coconut, curry leaves, mustard seeds, sambhar

nodes.label: North India
nodes.description: Garam masala, cumin, coriander, dairy-based dishes

nodes.label: Spice Trade History
nodes.description: Traders came from Europe and Arabia for Indian spices
